## Issues & Action Items

### 🚨 CRITICAL — node1 Disk Full (100%)
- **Impact:** No writes possible. Llama server still running but no new processes.
- **Recommendation:** Clean up old model files, build artifacts, or logs on node1.
- **Affected services:** Llama inference (node1/llamacpp), any file writes.

### ⚠️ Morning News Briefing — Consecutive Failures
- **Issue:** 2 consecutive failures due to LLM network error (cloud model endpoint).
- **Recommendation:** Check network connectivity from isolated sessions. May be transient.
- **Risk:** Missed daily briefings if not resolved.

### ⚠️ Vault Weekly Summary — Timeout
- **Issue:** Job timed out during model call (301s duration limit).
- **Recommendation:** Increase timeout or simplify weekly summary scope.
